results.name: Open Clinician Dashboard
results.observation: Dashboard UI renders successfully with all sidebars and main panels.

results.name: Create New Session
results.observation: System initializes a clean workspace and generates a session ID.

results.name: Load Patient Data
results.observation: Patient info, vitals, and history populate the right sidebar.

results.name: Send Clinician Text Query
results.input: Summarize the current risks for patient 10002428
results.observation: AI response streams correctly with relevant clinical insights.

results.name: Generate SOAP Note
results.input: Trigger 'Generate SOAP Note' from active session
results.observation: A structured SOAP note is generated based on the chat history.

results.name: Interactive Knowledge Graph
results.observation: 3D graph renders successfully with synced patient context.

results.name: Medical Image Upload
results.observation: Image is processed, previewed, and analysis is available in workspace.

results.name: Compound Figure Panel Detection
results.observation: System correctly identifies sub-panels and allows focused clinical review.

results.name: Reasoning Model Switching
results.observation: System updates the active agent model without crashing.

results.name: UI Workflow Persistence
results.input: Hard refresh browser page during session
results.observation: State is reset to default; previous progress must be manually reloaded.

issues.description: Frontend state is not persisted in localStorage or session URL.
